basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Jabalpur
basic_details.short_information: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Jabalpur (PDPM IIITDM Jabalpur) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position on a contract basis. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech with M.E./M.Tech or equivalent in CSE/IT, or B.Sc with M.Sc. in Mathematics or a related discipline along with a valid GATE/NET or equivalent national-level qualification and first-class academic record are eligible to apply online. The maximum age limit is 35 years. The application process will remain activ

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per the Institute norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech with M.E./M.Tech or equivalent in CSE/IT or B.Sc with M.Sc. in Mathematics or related discipline (with valid qualified national-level exam i.e. GATE/NET etc.) with 1st class
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech with M.E./M.Tech or equivalent in CSE/IT or B.Sc with M.Sc. in Mathematics or related discipline (with valid qualified national-level exam i.e. GATE/NET etc.) with 1st class

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA as per Institute norms

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech with M.E./M.Tech or equivalent in CSE/IT, or a B.Sc with M.Sc. in Mathematics or a related discipline with a valid GATE/NET qualification and a first-class academic record.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- along with HRA as per the Institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode can candidates apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur must be submitted in online mode only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Junior Research Fellow in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIITDM Jabalpur located?
faq.answer: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Jabalpur is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 482005.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur is a contract-based job.
